creator: kazham@mail.ru
text:
Hi!
I'm new in FreeBSD.
During installation of FreeBSD 7.2 I get an error message of this kind:

panic: ohci_add_done: addr 0xd7ef17d0 not found
cpuid = 0
Uptime: 1s
Cannot dump. No dump device defined.
Automatic reboot in 15 seconds - press a key on the console to abort
--> Press a key on the console to reboot?
--> or switch off the system now.

How this problem could be solved?
Thank you!

My configuration:
AMD Athlon64 X2 on ASUS M2A-VM(North-AMD690G,South-ATI SB600) with 4Gb
of DDR800. HDD - Seagate 500Gb on SATA.
